SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.Logic

Class PlayingGrid

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.Logic.PlayingGrid
public class PlayingGrid extends Object
This class represents the playing area of a Player

  • Constructor Details

    • PlayingGrid

      public PlayingGrid()
      Class constructor: instantiates a new PlayingGrid.

  • Method Details

    • placeStartCard

      public void placeStartCard(int i, int j, GameCard startcard) throws InvalidPlacementException
      Place the first card in an empty position.
      Parameters:
      i - : an int that represents the row
      j - : an int that represents the column
      startcard - is the initial card to place
      Throws:
      InvalidPlacementException - when there's been already a start card.

    • place

      public int place(int i, int j, GameCard card) throws InvalidPlacementException
      Place a card on the grid.
      Parameters:
      i - an int that represents the row
      j - an int that represents the column
      card - is the card to be placed
      Returns:
      the number of points to assign after placing the card
      Throws:
      InvalidPlacementException - when it is not possible to place the card in that position, with different messages that describe what went wrong

    • getPlaceablePosition

      public List<Coordinate> getPlaceablePosition(int i, int j) throws InvalidSearchPositionException
      Get the positions where it is possible to place, around the card in the given position.
      Parameters:
      i - an int that represents the row
      j - an int that represents the column
      Returns:
      a list of Coordinate: the placeable positions around the given card
      Throws:
      InvalidSearchPositionException

    • getLastPlacedCard

      public GameCard getLastPlacedCard()
      Gets last placed card.
      Returns:
      the last placed card

    • getPlcards

      public GameCard[][] getPlcards()
      Get the matrix with the played cards.
      Returns:
      the matrix with the played cards.

    • getNumElements

      public int getNumElements(Element e)
      Gets the number of visible elements on the grid.
      Parameters:
      e - is the type of element
      Returns:
      the number of visible elements on the grid (-1 if the given element is unknown)

    • CheckCardPlaceability

      public boolean CheckCardPlaceability(GameCard card)
      Check if a card fulfills the requirements for placing
      Parameters:
      card - the card to be placed
      Returns:
      true if the card fulfills the requirements, false if there are not enough elements on the grid.

    • ComputePoints

      public int ComputePoints()
      Compute the points to assign to the player after a card is placed
      Returns:
      the number of points gained

    • setLastPlacedCard

      public void setLastPlacedCard(GameCard card)
      Set the last placed card
      Parameters:
      card - the last placed card

    • cellIsEmpty

      public boolean cellIsEmpty(int row, int column)
      Checks if a cell in the playing grid contains a GameCard or not
      Parameters:
      row - the row index in the playing grid
      column - the column index in the playing grid
      Returns:
      true if the cell is empty; false if there is a card

    • checkColourMatch

      public boolean checkColourMatch(int row, int column, PatternObjectiveCard patternObjCard, int coordReqPatternIndex)
      Checks if the colour of a cell of the playing grid and a cell in the required submatrix to find match
      Parameters:
      row - the row index in the playing grid
      column - the column index in the playing grid
      patternObjCard - a given pattern objective card to find in the playing grid
      coordReqPatternIndex - index of the cell in the submatrix that we're checking
      Returns:
      true if the colours of the given cell and the cell in the required pattern match; otherwise false.

    • cardWasAlreadyUsedForThisObjective

      public boolean cardWasAlreadyUsedForThisObjective(int row, int column, PatternObjectiveCard patternObjCard)
      Checks if a gamecard in the playing grid has already been used for a given pattern objective
      Parameters:
      row - row index of the gamecard to check
      column - column index of the gamecard to check
      patternObjCard - the pattern objective card to check
      Returns:
      true if the card was already used for the given objective; otherwise false.

    • markCardAsUsedForThisObjective

      public void markCardAsUsedForThisObjective(int row, int column, PatternObjectiveCard patternObjCard)
      Marks a gamecard in the playing grid as used for a given pattern objective
      Parameters:
      row - the row index of the gamecard to check
      column - the column index of the gamecard to check
      patternObjCard - the pattern objective card completed

    • getNumElements

      public int[] getNumElements()
      Getter method for the array that contains the number of visible elements of each type.
      Returns:
      Array of integers, with each value representing the number of each type of element: position = 0 : n° of ANIMAL position = 1 : n° of FUNGUS position = 2 : n° of INKWELL position = 3 : n° of INSECT position = 4 : n° of MANUSCRIPT position = 5 : n° of PLANT position = 6 : n° of QUILL

    • setNumElements

      public void setNumElements(int[] numElements) throws IllegalRequirementsException
      Getter method for the array that contains the number of visible elements of each type.
      Parameters:
      numElements - an array of integers, with each value representing the number of each type of element. (array with the same order of the one returned by getNumElements)
      Throws:
      IllegalRequirementsException - if the length of numElements is not 7
